anchors.label: delay_bc_v1
anchors.comment: LD BC,nn / DEC BC / LD A,B / OR C / JR NZ,$-4

anchors.label: delay_bc_v2
anchors.comment: LD BC,nn / DEC BC / LD A,C / OR B / JR NZ,$-4

anchors.label: im2_setup
anchors.comment: LD A,n / LD I,A / IM 2 / EI

anchors.label: cls_ldir
anchors.comment: LD HL,$4000 / LD DE,$4001 / LD BC,$17FF / LD (HL),0 / LDIR

anchors.label: cls_attr
anchors.comment: LD HL,$5800 / LD DE,$5801 / LD BC,$02FF / LD (HL),attr / LDIR

anchors.label: di_halt
anchors.comment: DI / HALT — wait for interrupt with interrupts disabled (frame sync)

anchors.label: rom_load_edge
anchors.comment: ROM tape loader edge loop (LD-SAMPLE) — INC B / RET Z / LD A,$7F / IN A,($FE) / RRA / RET NC / XOR C / AND $20 / JR Z,$-13

anchors.label: next_screen_line
anchors.comment: INC H / LD A,H / AND 7 / JR NZ,+n / LD A,L / ADD A,32 / LD L,A / JR C,+n / LD A,H / SUB 8 / LD H,A — Spectrum screen line advance

anchors.label: masked_sprite_col
anchors.comment: LD A,(DE) / AND (HL) / INC HL / OR (HL) / LD (DE),A — masked sprite column write

anchors.label: xor_sprite_col
anchors.comment: LD A,(DE) / XOR (HL) / LD (DE),A — XOR sprite column write
